proof:
calc |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by
        apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
        linarith [abs_add (x^2) (x*y), abs_nonneg (y^2)]
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_pow, abs_mul, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring
failed_attempts:
simp [abs_mul, sq_abs]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

simp [sq_abs]
  have hxy : |x * y| ≤ |x| * (|x| + 1) := by
    calc |x * y| = |x| * |y| := abs_mul x y
    _ ≤ |x| * (|x| + 1) := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
  have hy2 : |y ^ 2| ≤ (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
    simp only [sq_abs]
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg y, sq_nonneg (|x| + 1), abs_nonneg x]
  calc |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by
      apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
      linarith [abs_add (x^2) (x*y), abs_nonneg (y^2)]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
      have : |x^2| = |x|^2 := by simp [sq_abs]
      have : |y^2| = |y|^2 := by simp [sq_abs]
      nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

simp [abs_mul, sq_abs]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by bound
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x]
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y, hy']
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| 
        ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by bound
      _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_pow, abs_mul, abs_pow]
      _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
      _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

have hxy : |x * y| ≤ |x| * (|x| + 1) := by
      calc |x * y| = |x| * |y| := abs_mul x y
        _ ≤ |x| * (|x| + 1) := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
    have hy2 : |y ^ 2| ≤ (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
      calc |y ^ 2| = |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_pow]
        _ ≤ (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg y]
    calc |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by
          apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
          have : |x ^ 2 + x * y| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| := abs_add _ _
          linarith
      _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x * y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_pow, abs_pow]
      _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
      _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

have hxy : |x * y| ≤ |x| * (|x| + 1) := by
      calc |x * y| = |x| * |y| := abs_mul x y
        _ ≤ |x| * (|x| + 1) := by bound
    have hy2 : |y ^ 2| ≤ (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
      calc |y ^ 2| = |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_pow]
        _ ≤ (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by bound
    calc |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by bound
      _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by rw [abs_pow]
      _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by bound
      _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

have h1 : |x * y| ≤ |x| * (|x| + 1) := by
      calc |x * y| = |x| * |y| := abs_mul x y
        _ ≤ |x| * (|x| + 1) := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
    have h2 : |y ^ 2| ≤ (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by
      calc |y ^ 2| = |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_pow]
        _ ≤ (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
    calc |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by
          calc |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2 + x * y| + |y ^ 2| := abs_add _ _
            _ ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by linarith [abs_add (x^2) (x*y)]
      _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by rw [abs_pow]
      _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by linarith
      _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by bound
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

have hx2 : |x^2| = |x|^2 := by rw [abs_sq]
    have hy2 : |y^2| = |y|^2 := by rw [abs_sq]
    calc |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| 
        ≤ |x^2| + |x * y| + |y^2| := by bound
      _ = |x|^2 + |x| * |y| + |y|^2 := by rw [abs_sq, abs_mul, abs_sq]
      _ ≤ |x|^2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1)^2 := by bound
      _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

simp [abs_mul, sq_abs]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by bound
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

simp [abs_mul, sq_abs]
    nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]

sq_abs x
    have h2 : |y ^ 2| = |y| ^ 2 := sq_abs y
    have h3 : |x * y| = |x| * |y| := abs_mul x y
    calc |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| 
        ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y + y ^ 2| := abs_add _ _
        _ ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by linarith [abs_add (x * y) (y ^ 2)]
        _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [h1, h2, h3]
        _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
        _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

simp [abs_mul, sq_abs]
      _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
      _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

simp [abs_mul, sq_abs]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y, hy']
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

sq_abs y
        _ ≤ (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
    calc |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| 
        ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y + y ^ 2| := abs_add _ _
        _ ≤ |x ^ 2| + (|x * y| + |y ^ 2|) := by linarith [abs_add (x * y) (y ^ 2)]
        _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by rw [sq_abs]
        _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by linarith [h1, h2]
        _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

simp [abs_mul, sq_abs]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y, hy']
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

have hx2 : |x ^ 2| = |x| ^ 2 := by rw [sq_abs]
    have hy2 : |y ^ 2| = |y| ^ 2 := by rw [sq_abs]
    have hxy : |x * y| = |x| * |y| := abs_mul x y
    calc |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| 
        ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y + y ^ 2| := abs_add _ _
        _ ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by linarith [abs_add (x * y) (y ^ 2)]
        _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [hx2, hxy, hy2]
        _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
        _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

simp [abs_mul, sq_abs]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by bound
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

simp [abs_mul, sq_abs]
    _ ≤ |x|^2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1)^2 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg (|y| - (|x| + 1)), sq_nonneg |x|, sq_nonneg |y|, abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

simp [abs_mul, sq_abs]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x]
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x|^2 + |x| * |y| + |y|^2 := by
      have h1 : |x^2| = |x|^2 := by rw [abs_pow]
      have h2 : |x * y| = |x| * |y| := abs_mul x y
      have h3 : |y^2| = |y|^2 := by rw [abs_pow]
      calc |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x^2| + |x * y| + |y^2| := by
          have := abs_add (x^2 + x*y) (y^2)
          have := abs_add (x^2) (x*y)
          linarith [abs_nonneg (x^2), abs_nonneg (x*y), abs_nonneg (y^2), abs_add (x^2) (x*y), abs_add (x^2 + x*y) (y^2)]
        _ = |x|^2 + |x| * |y| + |y|^2 := by rw [h1, h2, h3]
    _ ≤ |x|^2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1)^2 := by
      have hxnonneg : 0 ≤ |x| := abs_nonneg x
      nlinarith [abs_nonneg y, hy']
    _ = 3 * |x|^2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

calc |x ^ 2 + x * y + y ^ 2| ≤ |x ^ 2| + |x * y| + |y ^ 2| := by bound
    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_pow, abs_mul, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

simp [abs_mul, sq_abs]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
    _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

simp only [abs_mul, sq_abs] at this
        exact this
      _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ = 3 * |x| ^ 2 + 3 * |x| + 1 := by ring

    _ = |x| ^ 2 + |x| * |y| + |y| ^ 2 := by rw [abs_pow, abs_mul, abs_pow]
    _ ≤ |x| ^ 2 + |x| * (|x| + 1) + (|x| + 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y]
